claim_boundary: Sequence-to-computational-docking-geometry supervision only; not binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or formal validation.

merge_policy.protocol_compatibility: Require the frozen PASS semantic-compatibility audit before sharing the V4-H/V4-I scalar target scale.
merge_policy.old_teacher: Preserve the canonical 1507 scalar labels and reliability fields unchanged.
merge_policy.v4i_stage1: Use the 1881 rows with complete dual-receptor scalar labels.
merge_policy.v4i_stage2: For the selected 500 candidates, replace the Stage-1 scalar label with the authoritative combined-seed candidate-level median label.
merge_policy.technical_incomplete: Retain in a separate audit table with blank scalar labels; never impute.
merge_policy.duplicates: Fail closed on any candidate-id or sequence-SHA overlap across the old and V4-I teacher sources.
merge_policy.split: Bind every V4-I row to the pre-existing whole-parent outer fold; never random-split sibling sequences.

forbidden_inputs: campaign/source id as a model feature
Docking pose-derived features in a sequence-only model
